extra.reasoning: The property holds. The input variable stiff_neck does not appear in the condition of any of the 8 rules (which key only on dizziness, abdominal_pain, palpitations, fever, syncope, vomiting, severe_headache, and slurred_speech). Since acuity is computed solely from the matching rules among these 8 plus the default (routine), toggling stiff_neck changes no rule's matching status. Therefore, for every assignment of the other 8 inputs, acuity(stiff_neck=true) equals acuity(stiff_neck=false). Equality trivially satisfies the monotonicity requirement that acuity be "no lower than before," so no input combination can violate the property.
